CREATE TABLE [dbo].[__BSD_ArticleLifeCyclePhases](
	[Id] [int] IDENTITY(1,1) NOT NULL,
	[PhaseName] [nvarchar](100) NULL,
	[PhaseDescription] [nvarchar](1000) NULL,
	[CreateUserId] [int] NULL,
	[CreateUserName] [nvarchar](150) NULL,
	[CreateTime] [datetime] NULL,
	[UpdateUserId] [int] NULL,
	[UpdateUserName] [nvarchar](150) NULL,
	[UpdateTime] [datetime] NULL
)

CREATE TABLE [dbo].[__BSD_ArticleLifeCycles](
	[Id] [int] IDENTITY(1,1) NOT NULL,
	[ArticleId] [int] NULL,
	[PhaseId] [int] NULL,
	[PhaseName] [nvarchar](100) NULL,
	[PhaseOrderInCycle] [int] NULL,
	[CreateUserId] [int] NULL,
	[CreateUserName] [nvarchar](150) NULL,
	[CreateTime] [datetime] NULL,
	[UpdateUserId] [int] NULL,
	[UpdateUserName] [nvarchar](150) NULL,
	[UpdateTime] [datetime] NULL
)
